I made good progress on my share, but teammate_A is now directly asking for help with their part again.
Teammate_A appreciates my boundary and offered to split or defer their work, confirming that trust remains intact despite the tighter deadline I just accepted.
Teammate_A accepted my boundary and is taking ownership of their work, confirming our relationship remains strong despite the deadline pressure.
My progress on the group project increased to 0.62 after two hours of work, despite my current sleep debt and moderate stress levels.
I failed to finish my share of the project by the 19:00 deadline despite making progress, and I am now facing this shortfall with high stress and sleep debt.

My project share progress has steadily increased to 0.82 after working at 22:00, though I remain behind the original deadline with high stress and sleep debt.
I worked two hours at midnight, raising my progress to 0.88, yet I remain behind the original deadline with zero energy and accumulated sleep debt.
I reached 0.91 progress after one hour of work at 01:00, but my energy is now zero and sleep debt persists despite the slight advancement.
After working late into the night and reaching 91% progress, I let the moment pass at 01:30 with zero energy, leaving me behind deadline and exhausted.
I reached 95% progress after another hour of work, but my energy remains depleted and sleep debt is still accumulating.
